kharif.general: Sow MTU-1010 or Swarna varieties. Transplant 25-day-old seedlings at 20x15 cm spacing. Apply 120 kg N/ha in 3 splits.
kharif.pest_stemBorer: Apply Cartap Hydrochloride 4G @ 25 kg/ha or spray Chlorpyrifos 20EC @ 2.5 ml/L. Set up pheromone traps @ 5/acre.
kharif.pest_leafFolder: Spray Monocrotophos 36SL @ 1.5 ml/L. Drain field for 3-4 days to reduce humidity.
kharif.pest_brownPlantHopper: Apply Imidacloprid 17.8SL @ 0.5 ml/L at base of plants. Avoid excessive nitrogen.
kharif.fertilizer: Basal: 40 kg N + 40 kg P2O5 + 40 kg K2O/ha. Top dress 40 kg N at tillering and 40 kg N at panicle initiation.
kharif.market: Current paddy MSP: ₹2,183/quintal. Nearest APMC: Bhadrachalam. Sell after drying to 14% moisture.

kharif.general: Use Bt cotton hybrids. Sow at 90x60 cm spacing. Requires 3-4 irrigations. Apply 120:60:60 NPK kg/ha.
kharif.pest_bollworm: Monitor with pheromone traps. Spray Spinosad 45SC @ 0.3 ml/L or Emamectin Benzoate 5SG @ 0.4 g/L.
kharif.pest_whitefly: Apply Thiamethoxam 25WG @ 0.3 g/L. Remove and destroy infested leaves.
kharif.fertilizer: Apply FYM 10 t/ha before sowing. Split N application: 50% basal, 25% at squaring, 25% at boll formation.
kharif.market: Cotton MSP: ₹6,620/quintal (medium staple). Sell at CCI or APMC Warangal for best price.

kharif.general: Sow hybrid varieties like DHM-117. Spacing: 60x20 cm. Requires 5-6 irrigations. Apply 150:75:75 NPK.
kharif.pest_fallArmyworm: Apply Spinetoram 11.7SC @ 0.5 ml/L or Emamectin Benzoate. Apply in whorl stage. Use sand+lime mixture.
kharif.fertilizer: Apply 50% N + full P + full K at sowing. Remaining 50% N in 2 splits at knee-high and tasseling.
kharif.market: Maize MSP: ₹2,090/quintal. Store at <12% moisture. Nearest procurement: Khammam APMC.

kharif.general: Use Karjat-6 or Ratnagiri-24 varieties suited to laterite soils. Transplant at 20x15 cm. Apply lime if pH < 5.5.
kharif.pest_gundhibug: Spray Malathion 50EC @ 2 ml/L at milky grain stage. Drain field and spray in early morning.
kharif.pest_blastDisease: Apply Tricyclazole 75WP @ 0.6 g/L or Isoprothiolane 40EC @ 1.5 ml/L at boot leaf stage.
kharif.fertilizer: Apply 80:40:40 NPK kg/ha. Use green manure (Sesbania) before transplanting to reduce fertilizer need.
kharif.market: Paddy MSP: ₹2,183/quintal. Konkan region has good demand for aromatic varieties. Sell at Ratnagiri APMC.

kharif.general: Apply FYM 50 kg/tree. Prune dead wood after harvest. Mulch with dry leaves to conserve moisture.
kharif.pest_teaMosquito: Spray Dimethoate 30EC @ 2 ml/L or Imidacloprid 17.8SL @ 0.5 ml/L at flushing stage.
kharif.fertilizer: Apply 500g N + 125g P + 125g K per tree per year in 2 splits (pre-monsoon and post-monsoon).
kharif.market: Raw cashew nut: ₹120-150/kg. Export quality: Grade W-180 to W-320. Sell to APMC Panvel or exporters.

kharif.general: Sow JS-335 or NRC-37 varieties. Spacing: 45x5 cm. Inoculate with Rhizobium before sowing. Apply 30:60:40 NPK.
kharif.pest_girdle_beetle: Collect and destroy infested plants. Spray Chlorpyrifos 20EC @ 2.5 ml/L at 30-35 DAS.
kharif.pest_stemFly: Seed treatment with Thiamethoxam 70WS @ 3 g/kg seed. Spray Dimethoate 30EC @ 2 ml/L.
kharif.fertilizer: Apply 20 kg N + 60 kg P2O5 + 40 kg K2O/ha as basal. Rhizobium inoculation reduces N requirement.
kharif.market: Soybean MSP: ₹4,600/quintal. Sell at NCDEX-linked mandis in Indore or Ujjain for best price.

rabi.general: Sow GW-322 or HI-8498 varieties. Sowing window: Nov 1-30. Spacing: 22.5 cm rows. Apply 120:60:40 NPK.
rabi.pest_aphid: Spray Dimethoate 30EC @ 1.5 ml/L or Imidacloprid 17.8SL @ 0.5 ml/L when population exceeds 10/tiller.
rabi.pest_yellowRust: Apply Propiconazole 25EC @ 1 ml/L at flag leaf stage. Use resistant varieties like HD-2967.
rabi.fertilizer: Apply 60 kg N at sowing, 30 kg N at first irrigation (CRI stage), 30 kg N at jointing.
rabi.market: Wheat MSP: ₹2,275/quintal. Sell at FCI procurement centers or APMC Bhopal. Grade A quality fetches premium.

rabi.general: Sow JG-11 or Vihar variety. Spacing: 30x10 cm. Requires only 1-2 irrigations. Apply 20:40:20 NPK.
rabi.pest_podBorer: Install pheromone traps @ 5/acre. Spray Indoxacarb 14.5SC @ 1 ml/L at 50% flowering.
rabi.fertilizer: Apply 20 kg N + 40 kg P2O5 + 20 kg K2O/ha as basal. Rhizobium inoculation essential.
rabi.market: Chickpea MSP: ₹5,440/quintal. Sell at APMC Sehore or Vidisha. Bold grain variety fetches 10-15% premium.

general_soil_advice.residue_incorporation: Incorporate crop residues to add 15-20 kg N/ha equivalent. Reduces need for chemical fertilizers by 20%.
general_soil_advice.manure_compost: Apply FYM @ 5-10 t/ha or vermicompost @ 2-3 t/ha to improve soil organic carbon and water retention.
general_soil_advice.soil_testing: Get soil tested every 3 years. Contact nearest KVK or soil testing lab. Cost: ₹50-100 per sample.
general_soil_advice.green_manure: Grow Sesbania or Dhaincha for 45 days and incorporate before transplanting to add 60-80 kg N/ha.
